302 I4800_DMNT_CD I4800_DMNT_CD I4800 Active Diagnoses: Dementia Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of dementia (e.g., Lewy body dementia, vascular or multi-infarct dementia; mixed dementia; fronto-temporal dementia such as Pick's Disease; and dementia related to stroke, Parkinson's Disease or Creutzfeldt-Jakob
